nodes.label: AI as tool for tedious execution tasks
nodes.label_negative: AI as substitute for human creative expression
nodes.grounding_span: AI helps me get through steps like that without feeling overwhelmed and helpless

nodes.label: AI as placeholder and prototype creator
nodes.grounding_span: I used AI to help create a placeholder cover for my game

nodes.label: AI reliability and precision in execution
nodes.grounding_span: the AI had difficulty with certain parameters like layering text on an image

nodes.label: AI as knowledge gap filler
nodes.grounding_span: I think it's useful for filling in knowledge gaps

nodes.label: AI environmental sustainability
nodes.grounding_span: The excessive use of power and energy and creation of pollution in current AI is unsustainable

nodes.label: Creative fulfillment and passion
nodes.grounding_span: I love the creative aspects of both board game design and creative writing

nodes.label: Ethical integrity in creative fields
nodes.grounding_span: I have huge ethical concerns about using AI for the actual creative steps

nodes.label: Environmental responsibility
nodes.grounding_span: The excessive use of power and energy and creation of pollution in current AI is unsustainable

nodes.label: Positive appreciation for AI as efficiency booster
nodes.grounding_span: AI helps me get through steps like that without feeling overwhelmed and helpless

nodes.label: Frustration with AI technical limitations
nodes.grounding_span: This was frustrating and I wound up using AI to create the representative image while creating the text myself

nodes.label: Strong ethical opposition to AI in core creative tasks
nodes.grounding_span: I would never use AI to generate a game idea for me or write a story

nodes.label: Skepticism about AI's long-term viability due to environmental concerns
nodes.grounding_span: I think AI may ultimately be a passing fad

nodes.label: Conditional optimism if environmental impact is addressed
nodes.grounding_span: if companies are able to adapt and make their environmental impact negligible, then I could see AI becoming a mainstream and accepted tool

nodes.label: Domain-specific boundary setting — clear separation between AI-appropriate and human-only tasks
nodes.grounding_span: I would never use AI to generate a game idea for me or write a story

nodes.label: Pragmatic compromise — settling for acceptable output when ideal is unattainable
nodes.grounding_span: I am often left with a final product that I have to 'settle' for
